title: auth — published macros
description: Two macros. `Str::sanctum_token_prefix` gives callers a consistent way to format Sanctum PATs (Laravel doesn't expose one out of the box). `Blueprint::auth_token_fields` is the migration shorthand for the token-storage column set every auth-owned token table shares.
namespace_note: Blueprint macros extend `Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint`. Str macros extend `Illuminate\Support\Str`. Both are Laravel core classes.

macros.name: Str::sanctum_token_prefix
macros.returns: The full Sanctum PAT wire-format: `<tokenId>|<secret>`. Consumers rarely need this — Sanctum's `createToken()` method already returns the formatted string. This macro is for the (rare) case where a test fixture needs to reconstruct the format from parts.
macros.description: Formats a Sanctum PAT for wire transport. Never emits into logs / errors / audit trails.

macros.name: Blueprint::auth_token_fields

columns.name: token_hash
columns.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the opaque token plaintext. Plaintext returned once in the response body only.

columns.name: expires_at
columns.description: Absolute expiry — the token cannot be used past this timestamp regardless of consumed_at state.

columns.name: consumed_at
columns.description: Set when the token is exchanged (atomic consume). Re-presenting a consumed token is a REPLAY signal.

columns.name: ip_address_hash
columns.description: SHA-256 of the request IP at issue time. Plaintext IP never persisted.

columns.name: user_agent_hash
columns.description: SHA-256 of the request User-Agent at issue time. Plaintext never persisted.

indexes.description: UNIQUE index for constant-time lookup during token verification.
Partial index for PurgeExpired*Job's fast enumeration of unconsumed expired tokens.

macros.description: Idempotent migration shorthand for token-shape columns shared across auth_refresh_tokens, auth_password_resets, auth_email_verifications, auth_cross_app_grants. Each table adds its own domain-specific columns (family_id, identity_id, target_application_id, etc.) alongside these shared ones.
macros.boot_order_note: Registered by AuthServiceProvider::boot(). Because module priority is 25, every downstream migration that would use this macro sees it available.
